sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures or missing features on JDK 21.

sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce the new baseline.

sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be compatible with Spring Boot 3.x dependency management or newer JDBC drivers required for Java 21.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 21 with the new dependencies.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.servlet does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments required by Spring Boot 3.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in Spring Security HTTP configuration.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The method authorizeRequests().antMatchers() is removed in Spring Security 6 (required for Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate formLogin configuration from builder pattern to lambda DSL.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The method formLogin() returning a FormLoginConfigurer is removed in Spring Security 6, causing a compile error.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate logout configuration from builder pattern to lambda DSL.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The method logout() returning a LogoutConfigurer is removed in Spring Security 6, causing a compile error.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the Java EE javax package to the Jakarta EE jakarta package.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and thus Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 ecosystems), causing a compile error 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.
